PAGE.TITLE: Login to your account
PAGE.SUBTITLE: Enter your email below to login to your account.

BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.TITLE: Your sign-in was blocked
BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.MESSAGE: Your account has been blocked after multiple consecutive login attempts.
BLOCKED_ACCOUNT.EMAIL_SENT: We've sent you a notification via email with instructions on how to unblock it.

RESET_PASSWORD.TITLE: Reset your password
RESET_PASSWORD.SUBTITLE: Type your email address to send instructions to reset your password to you inbox.

ERRORS.EMAIL_NOT_FOUND: This email does not exist in our database.

CHECK_INBOX.TITLE: Check your inbox
CHECK_INBOX.MESSAGE: We've sent you an email to [email]. Follow the instructions to access your account.
